description_long: This is a large, multi-story brick house set within a landscaped lot featuring mature trees and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The house combines traditional red brickwork with modern flat-roofed extensions and large windows, creating a blend of classic and contemporary architectural elements. The front facade is distinguished by a prominent entryway with steps, a portico, and symmetrical window placement. The property is enclosed by fencing and includes a backyard area with visible greenery and a possible pool. The roofline is primarily flat, with some sections featuring parapets and rooftop structures. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A spacious, multi-story brick house with modern flat-roofed extensions, large windows, and a landscaped lot with mature trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and symmetrical landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, brickwork, and the length of the house along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by dense trees, with glimpses of the backyard and possible pool area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more brick facade, flat roof sections, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large modern windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front entry with steps, portico, and symmetrical columns
